name: Vicki's Banana Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Cream together the butter and light brown sugar until light and creamy.
3. Beat in the egg.
4. Sift together the whole wheat flour, white flour, baking soda, salt, ginger, and mace (or pumpkin pie spice).
5. Mash the bananas well and stir with yogurt until just mixed.
6. Stir in the vanilla extract.
7. Alternately add the dry ingredients and banana mixture to the butter mixture, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Mix only enough to combine well.
8. Stir in the pecans and dates.
9. Grease and flour a 9x5 loaf pan.
10. Bake for 50-60 minutes.
11. Cool in the pan for 5-10 minutes before transferring to a rack.
